who: CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/week
offer: For CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/week, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We provide accurate cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for CFOs seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about cash flow tools
DM outreach to CFOs with a brief demo video
Participate in forums where CFOs share accounting tools
try_it: Allow users to input data and generate cash flow reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual input process
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for insights
Provide early access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable saving common inputs for quick access
Set default reminders for cash flow reviews
Allow CSV imports for existing financial data
